name: Service Dll Hijacking
notes:
This rule detects changes to the "ServiceDLL" value related to a service in the registry. This is often used as a method of persistence.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: ServiceDll Hijack
SIGMA Description: Detects changes to the "ServiceDLL" value related to a service in the registry. This is often used as a method of persistence.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE 'HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Parameters\ServiceDll' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\printconfig.dll' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'lsass.exe' AND (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\CurrentControlSet\Services\NTDS\Parameters\ServiceDll' AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%%systemroot%%\system32\ntdsa.dll') OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'poqexec.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Service Dll Hijacking on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE 'HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Parameters\ServiceDll' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\printconfig.dll' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'lsass.exe' AND (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\CurrentControlSet\Services\NTDS\Parameters\ServiceDll' AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%%systemroot%%\system32\ntdsa.dll') OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'poqexec.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects changes to the "ServiceDLL" value related to a service in the registry. This is often used as a method of persistence.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
